hypotheses.name: SV2 bottom-pole extracellular vesicle null (N=1000)
hypotheses.method: Gene-label shuffle null (N=1000). Top-K=52 genes at SV2 bottom pole (layer 11, SVD of 209-gene mean-centered embedding). Fisher exact test vs GO:0070062 extracellular vesicle (48 annotated genes). Compare obs Fisher p to null distribution.
hypotheses.next_action: Identify SV2 top-pole IL-4 gene members; run full SV2 layer scan across all 12 layers

hypotheses.name: 12-layer x 8-compartment systematic SV1 scan
hypotheses.method: For each of 12 layers and 8 GO compartments (mitochondrion GO:0005739, ER_lumen GO:0005788, extracellular_vesicle GO:0070062, cytoskeleton GO:0005856, plasma_membrane GO:0005886, nucleus GO:0005634, secreted GO:0005615, ribosome GO:0005840), compute Fisher OR on SV1 top/bottom-52 genes with N=200 gene-label shuffles. Record emp_p per cell.
hypotheses.result_value: 33/96 cells significant at emp_p<=0.05; ER_lumen and secreted persistent across all 12 layers; mito transient at L2-4 and L10
hypotheses.next_action: Replicate scan on SV2/SV3 projections to find EV and immune compartment layer profiles

hypotheses.name: Cross-layer SV1 rank stability (Spearman)
hypotheses.method: SVD of 209-gene mean-centered embedding at each of 12 layers. Extract SV1 projections [12, 209]. Compute Spearman r between all adjacent layer pairs. Compare mean adjacent r vs null (row-permutation control, N=200). Also compute SV1 variance explained per layer.
hypotheses.result_value: mean_adj_r=0.929, range=[0.663,0.980], emp_p=0.000 vs null mean=0.003; SV1 var_exp rises 19.1% to 76.7%
hypotheses.next_action: Compute same stability metric for SV2 and SV3; test if L10-L11 transition coincides with layer-specific mito enrichment change
